_note: Generated by stat_tests.py. silhouette bars = combined UMAP-10d silhouette (point) + paired image-bootstrap 95% CI; sig_B/sig_C brackets = [method_i, method_j, stars]. Methods: 0=MED-VAE, 1=SRM, 2=Procrustes. sig_B rows: 0 silhouette (bootstrap), 1 exact-match, 2 balanced (n=4 paired-t). sig_C rows: 0 comp_corr, 1 RSA, 2 voxel within-trial, 3 voxel cross-trial (n=4 paired-t).
